title: Two-Stage Retrieval with Structural LLM Re-Ranking
wikilinks: Hybrid Retrieval in Agent Memory Systems
Proxy-Pointer RAG: Structure Meets Scale at 100% Accuracy with Smarter Retrieval
summary: Proxy-Pointer RAG employs a two-stage retrieval pipeline: semantic recall via vector search, followed by structural LLM re-ranking. This ensures that retrieved sections are not only semantically relevant but also structurally appropriate...
